summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SchedulePageNew.jsx and SchoolSettingsPagePro.jsx updates. All features working correctly: schedule view by class/teacher, AI generation dialog, sessions with teacher/subject names, and settings page without add buttons.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing 35 sessions
context_for_next_testing_agent: SchedulePageNew.jsx and SchoolSettingsPagePro.jsx fully tested. Schedule page shows 35 sessions with proper teacher/subject names. View by class and view by teacher both working. AI generation dialog opens correctly. Settings page teachers/classes tabs have no add buttons, only info badges directing to 'إدارة المستخدمين والفصول'.

schedule_view_by_class.evidence: Shows 'جدول الصف الأول الابتدائي - أ' with sessions for that class, class selector works

schedule_view_by_teacher.evidence: Shows 'جدول أحمد عبد الرحمن' with all teacher's sessions across classes, teacher selector works

sessions_with_colors.evidence: Different subjects have different colors: لغتي (green), الرياضيات (blue), العلوم (purple), اللغة الإنجليزية (red), الدراسات الإسلامية (amber)

break_and_prayer_periods.evidence: الاستراحة (break) and فترة الصلاة (prayer) shown correctly with icons

ai_generation_dialog.evidence: Button 'معالجة الجدول بالذكاء الاصطناعي' opens AlertDialog with title and description

api_schedule_sessions.evidence: GET /api/schedule-sessions returns 35 sessions with teacher_name, subject_name, class_name populated

settings_teachers_no_add_button.evidence: Teachers tab shows 5 teachers, NO add button, info badge: 'لإضافة معلم، انتقل إلى إدارة المستخدمين والفصول'

settings_classes_no_add_button.evidence: Classes tab shows 3 classes, NO add button, info badge: 'لإضافة فصل، انتقل إلى إدارة المستخدمين والفصول'

view_mode_toggle.evidence: Toggle between 'بالفصل' and 'بالمعلم' works correctly, updates grid accordingly

frontend_tests.schedule_page_load: PASSED - Page loads with schedule grid
frontend_tests.view_by_class: PASSED - Shows class schedule with sessions
frontend_tests.view_by_teacher: PASSED - Shows teacher schedule with sessions
frontend_tests.settings_teachers_tab: PASSED - No add button, shows info badge
frontend_tests.settings_classes_tab: PASSED - No add button, shows info badge
